title: senecio caloneotes
intro: Senecio caloneotes, also known as Cape marigold or Yellow kniffeldaisy, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to the Western Cape region of South Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Senecio caloneotes include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote digestive health, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Senecio caloneotes can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or tea, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
